description: Live GitHub + WakaTime activity over the last 7 days.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu logged 33 hrs 53 mins of coding time, with a daily average of 3 hrs 37 mins. His WakaTime activity was spread across 6 projects, and the recorded languages were Java (40%), Other (36%), and Markdown (15%). No GitHub commits, pull requests, or new repositories were recorded.
